title: xanthophytum glabrum
intro: Xanthophytum glabrum, also known as Javanese bay leaves or Javanese bay, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthophytum glabrum are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Xanthophytum glabrum is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as salves and ointments.
